destinations.evidence: Engine-facing PayloadStore::resolve resolves with WaitForPending so an in-progress payload build can complete instead of immediately taking Earliest.

equivalence_argument: The engine/default store resolve entry point is the same method and directly selects WaitForPending; this preserves the eager consensus fetch invariant.
notes: Same implementation surface as invariant 569, with engine-facing semantics.
rationale: The primary diff changes PayloadStore::resolve from PayloadKind::Earliest to PayloadKind::WaitForPending and documents the eager-fetch behavior. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: PayloadStore::resolve should resolve payloads with PayloadKind::WaitForPending so eager consensus-side payload fetching waits for an in-progress payload build instead of immediately taking the earliest available payload.
suggested_falsification_tests: Start a payload job that has not produced a best payload yet, call PayloadStore::resolve, and assert it waits for the pending job result rather than immediately returning the earliest/empty payload path when the pending job succeeds.
summary: Engine payload resolve waits for pending builds.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Start a pending payload job, call engine PayloadStore::resolve, and assert it waits for the pending result rather than resolving Earliest.
title: Engine payload resolve waits for pending build
